meta.title: Triada, train and find professionals for free
meta.description: Triada connects athletes, coaches, nutritionists and professionals with simple tools for training, meals, progress tracking and collaboration.
meta.keywords: Triada, training app, find online coach, sports nutritionist, personal trainer, workout plans, sports diet, fitness progress, athlete platform, sport professionals

hero.title: Train better. Find the right professional.
hero.body: Triada brings training, meals and progress into one place. Free during the first release.

sections.title: Free. clear. immediate.
sections.body: Track workouts and meals in a few taps, without turning every update into extra work.

sections.title: Built by athletes for athletes!
sections.body: We are athletes and professionals, shaping Triada so you can focus on health, consistency and real progress.

sections.title: Show the progress that matters.
sections.body: Collect results, notes and key moments in a simple flow you can share with the people guiding you.

sections.title: You do not train alone.
sections.body: Find a professional or bring your team with you into the first platform that truly keeps everyone connected.

superTriada.title: SUPER TRIADA
superTriada.body: For coaches, nutritionists and professionals: fewer scattered tools, more time to truly support athletes and clients.

professionals.title: Try without pressure.
professionals.body: Join the first release, explore the professional suite and judge Triada on your real workflow.

professionals.title: All the tools you need.
professionals.body: Plans, diets, CRM, conversations, subscriptions and AI support in one operating flow.

professionals.title: Move without limits.
professionals.body: Import and export your work quickly, without losing what you already built on other platforms.

footerCta.title: join the first release
footerCta.claim: Training, nutrition and professionals in the same rhythm.
